noDownstream: {count} changed symbol(s), no downstream callers found.

degraded.no_data: This repo has not been indexed yet, so the blast radius is incomplete — an empty result means “unknown”, not “nothing is affected”. Re-analyze the repo to build the index.
degraded.flag_off: Code indexing is disabled (REPO_INTEL_ENABLED=false), so no blast radius can be computed.
degraded.index_partial: The code index is only partial — the repo was too large, or indexing timed out — so some callers and endpoints are missing.
degraded.index_failed: The last indexing run failed, so this blast radius may be incomplete. Re-analyze the repo to rebuild the index.
degraded.repo_too_large: The repo exceeded the indexing limits, so only part of it was indexed and some callers are missing.
degraded.unknown: The code index is incomplete, so some callers and endpoints may be missing.

priorPrs.title: Prior PRs touching these files
priorPrs.empty: No prior merged PRs touched the files this PR changes.
